title: Water Level Monitoring System (HC-SR04 & AO2YYUW UART)
description: Designed and implemented a water level monitoring system using ultrasonic sensors. Conducted sensor calibration, data acquisition, and data analysis. Assisted in system testing and performance evaluation.

title: Water Level Implementation with Window Comparator
description: Designed and implemented a water level detection system using a window comparator circuit. Configured upper and lower threshold voltages to classify water levels. Conducted circuit testing, calibration, and performance evaluation.
